_comment: Reference state captured at save time (SAVE_STATE_SAVED) for the stable_world fixture, generated with `--smoke --save-slot=stable_world --save-frame=300`. scripts/fixture_check.sh loads world.sav via `--smoke --load-fixture=<this dir>` and asserts the restored SAVE_STATE_LOADED line is within tolerance of these values (the round-trip proof), then confirms a short delta ran. Regenerate with scripts/fixture_check.sh --regen.
